title: Campaign of Asad in al-Khuttal
description: In it, Asad b. "Abdallah campaigned in al-Khuttal."' According to 'Ali b. Muhammad: The Khagan came against Asad when the latter had [already] gone back to al-Quwadhiyan'42 and recrossed the Oxus, so that there was no fighting between them in that campaign. According to Abu 'Ubaydah:' Rather, they defeated Asad and put him to shame, so that young boys sang: You have come form Khuttalan.` With a spoiled face you have come.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
